headerDisplay: Control DIHOOL IPS-S2 scissor lifts via the eWeLink LAN protocol. Enter your eWeLink credentials for automatic device discovery, or configure devices manually with their Device ID and LAN Key.

username.title: eWeLink Email or Phone
username.description: Your eWeLink account email or phone number. Required for automatic device discovery.

countryCode.title: Country Code
countryCode.description: Your country calling code (e.g. +1 for US, +44 for UK).

mode.title: Connection Mode
mode.description: In 'auto' mode, the plugin logs into eWeLink to discover devices, then controls them over LAN. In 'lan' mode, no cloud connection is made.

devices.title: Lift Devices
devices.description: Per-device configuration. If using cloud discovery, devices are found automatically — use this section to tune travel times and other settings.

deviceId.title: Device ID
deviceId.description: The eWeLink device ID (e.g. 100293a98d). Found in the eWeLink app under device settings, or in the Homebridge log on startup.

label.title: Display Name
label.description: Custom name for this lift in HomeKit.

operationTimeUp.title: Raise Time (seconds)
operationTimeUp.description: How long the motor runs to go from fully down (0%) to fully up (100%). Time this with a stopwatch for accuracy. Default: 8s.

operationTimeDown.title: Lower Time (seconds)
operationTimeDown.description: How long the motor runs to go from fully up (100%) to fully down (0%). Default: 8s.

calibrationExtra.title: Calibration Padding (seconds)
calibrationExtra.description: Extra seconds added when lowering to 0% to ensure the motor hits the bottom limit switch. Default: 2s.

lanKey.title: LAN Key
lanKey.description: Device encryption key. Only needed for LAN-only mode. Use the get-lankey script to obtain this.

ipAddress.title: IP Address Override
ipAddress.description: Manual IP address. Only needed if mDNS discovery doesn't find the device.

upChannel.title: Up Channel
upChannel.description: eWeLink outlet index for the UP motor control. Default: 0.

downChannel.title: Down Channel
downChannel.description: eWeLink outlet index for the DOWN motor control. Default: 1.

layout.title: eWeLink Account
layout.description: Enter your eWeLink credentials for automatic device discovery.

items.title: Travel Times
items.description: Controls how long the motor runs for each direction. Time your lift with a stopwatch and enter the values here.

items.title: Network & Channels
items.description: Only change these if you know what you're doing.
